description: Creates a custom tape pool for archiving virtual tapes with optional retention lock.

PoolARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool.
PoolARN.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 50  
Maximum Length: 500  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PoolId.description: The unique identifier of the custom tape pool, extracted from the ARN.
PoolId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the custom tape pool, extracted from the ARN.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PoolName.description: The name of the custom tape pool.
PoolName.markdownDescription:
The name of the custom tape pool.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 100  
Pattern: ^[ -\.0-\[\]-~]*[!-\.0-\[\]-~][ -\.0-\[\]-~]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

StorageClass.description: The storage class associated with the custom pool (S3 Glacier or S3 Glacier Deep Archive).
StorageClass.markdownDescription:
The storage class associated with the custom pool (S3 Glacier or S3 Glacier Deep Archive).

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: DEEP_ARCHIVE | GLACIER  
Update requires: Replacement

RetentionLockType.description: Tape retention lock type. Governance mode allows authorized removal; compliance mode prevents all removal.
RetentionLockType.markdownDescription:
Tape retention lock type. Governance mode allows authorized removal; compliance mode prevents all removal.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: COMPLIANCE | GOVERNANCE | NONE  
Update requires: Replacement

RetentionLockTimeInDays.description: Tape retention lock time in days (up to 36,500 days / 100 years).
RetentionLockTimeInDays.markdownDescription:
Tape retention lock time in days (up to 36,500 days / 100 years).

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: Replacement

Tags.description: A list of up to 50 tags for the tape pool.
Tags.markdownDescription:
A list of up to 50 tags for the tape pool.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.markdownDescription:
The tag key.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^([\p{L}\p{Z}\p{N}_.:/=+\-@]*)$  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The tag value.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

PoolARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool.
PoolARN.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 50  
Maximum Length: 500  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PoolId.description: The unique identifier of the custom tape pool, extracted from the ARN.
PoolId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the custom tape pool, extracted from the ARN.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
